pages.title: When Config is Saved
pages.text: Configuration persists: $(li)[DONE] When PreFab block is broken and replaced $(li)[DONE] When server restarts $(li)[DONE] When chunk unloads/reloads $(li)[DONE] When PreFab is picked up as item (PreFab-as-Item feature)$(br2)$(bold)Where config is stored$(): PreFab's NBT data

pages.title: Changing Configuration
pages.text: You can reconfigure faces at any time: $(li)Open GUI (Shift + Right-click with wrench) $(li)Change mode/filter/target $(li)Click Apply
